name: INKP-102
description: INKP-102 is the next generation sodium phosphate tablet designed to aid bowl preparation before colonoscopy.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in gastrointestinal diseases and disorders (miscellaneous).
mechanismOfAction: INKP-102 tablets are smaller in size and easier to swallow than the Company's currently marketed sodium phosphate tablet product, Visicol. The new INKP-102 tablets contain no microcrystalline cellulose (MCC), an inert, but highly insoluble, tablet binder.
